report.summary: v7 community cycle: Pivoted all social content to deployment-safe links only (git locks now 8 days, 658 uncommitted files). Drafted 4 tweets, 1 four-part thread, Discord/TG update, newsletter v3, and DCA poll — all linking exclusively to live production pages. Created Monday Pulse social card (1200x630 SVG). Content calendar v4 adds deploy-dependency tracking; all scheduled posts are deploy-independent.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet: Monday Market Pulse — F&G 10, whale +8,400 BTC, Iran deadline expired, links to /tools/fear-greed-timeline (LIVE)
Tweet: DCA Calculator Spotlight — $10/week = +202%, Monday effect +14.36%, links to /tools/dca-calculator (LIVE)
Tweet: Ecosystem Deep Dives tease — 86 protocol pages, links to /ecosystem (LIVE)
Thread (4-part): Fear-based DCA outperforms — 1,145% vs 202%, historical parallels, links to calculator + fear-greed (LIVE)
Tweet: DCA frequency poll for Wednesday engagement (no links needed)
Discord/TG: Monday evening update — market snapshot, 4 live tool links, 'coming this week' teaser for undeployed guides
Newsletter v3 for Thu Mar 27: F&G data lead, institutional summary, ecosystem hub feature, geopolitical check, Degen Corner with calculator CTA

sections.title: Social Visual Cards Created
items: Monday Pulse card (1200x630 SVG) — F&G 10 headline, 3 historical recovery boxes (COVID +1,400%, Luna +158%, FTX +300%), whale accumulation panel, DCA data panel, market price bar

sections.title: Deployment Warning
items: Git locks blocking deployment for 8 days (658 uncommitted files, +4 since v6)
434 declared pages vs ~315 in production = 119-page gap (widening)
v7 strategy: ALL social content uses verified-live links only
DCA Strategy Guide + TradFi-DeFi Convergence tweets deferred until deploy confirmed
CRITICAL: Resolve git locks (rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock) to unblock content promotion

sections.title: v6 → v7 Delta
items: Shifted from launch-announcement mode to deployment-safe engagement mode
All tweet links verified against production (deployed ≤ Mar 17)
Added ecosystem hub tease (86 protocols — high engagement, zero deploy risk)
Added DCA frequency poll for mid-week engagement
Newsletter v3: ecosystem hub feature added, F&G data leads
Content calendar v4: deploy-dependency column, all posts verified safe
New social card: Monday Pulse (F&G + historical + whale + DCA data)
